tools.name: get_conventions
tools.description: FREE. The exact calculation conventions of both engines (listed FRN: SARB §2.2.3 compounded index, 5-bday lookback, Modified Following; OTC: 1-bday lookback, Act/365, half-up 4dp), the verification tolerance, and the index source. Call this first.

tools.name: get_latest_index
tools.description: FREE. The latest published SARB Compounded ZARONIA Index point — date and 12dp value. Use it to confirm data freshness before verifying.

tools.name: verify_frn_coupon
tools.description: PAID ($0.25). Independently recompute and verify a listed South African ZARONIA FRN coupon (SARB §2.2.3 compounded-index formula). Returns the coupon to 4dp, full audit workings (observation dates, index values, formula), and a match/mismatch verdict at 0.05bp tolerance when expected_coupon_pct is g

tools.name: verify_otc_coupon
tools.description: PAID ($0.10). Independently recompute and verify an OTC money-market ZARONIA coupon (1-bday lookback, Act/365, half-up 4dp). Returns coupon, workings and a verdict at 0.05bp tolerance when expected_coupon_pct is given. Pass api_key if you have one; otherwise the response explains how to pay via x402

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "verify_frn_coupon" references sensitive artifacts (api_key). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.
